1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has other open lesion(s) on the foot. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)

443 M1040D_OPEN_LSN_CD M1040D_OPEN_LSN_CD M1040D Other Skin Problems: Open Lesions Other Than Ulcers Rashes Cuts Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident has lesion(s) other than ulcers, rashes or cuts (e.g., cancer lesion). -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
